steps.title: Calculate the retail price from the wholesale price
steps.content:
The retail price is 285% of the wholesale price of \$8.00.
$$\text{Retail price} = 285\% \times 8 = 2.85 \times 8 = 22.8 \text{ dollars}$$

steps.title: Apply the 80% discount to find the discounted price
steps.content:
A discount of 80% off means the customer pays only 20% of the retail price (since $100\% - 80\% = 20\%$).
$$\text{Discounted price} = 20\% \times 22.8 = 0.2 \times 22.8 = 4.56 \text{ dollars}$$
The discounted price of each keychain is \$4.56, which is equivalent to the fraction 114/25. Either form (4.56 or 114/25) may be entered as the student-produced response.
